hero.metaDescription: I build backend systems with Python and FastAPI, and ship full-stack products with Next.js. Currently looking for remote opportunities.
hero.subtitle: Python · FastAPI · PostgreSQL · Next.js
hero.tagline: Building reliable systems for distributed teams.

about.title: About
about.bio:
Backend engineer with 6+ years building Python systems for enterprise operations, REST API integrations, process automation, and custom modules deployed across multiple client environments. 5x certified in a large-scale Python/PostgreSQL platform serving enterprise clients, with hands-on experience in version migrations, webhook architectures, and production debugging.

Now shipping full-stack applications with FastAPI, async SQLAlchemy, Next.js, and TypeScript. Deployed projects at lucasavila.dev. Including a finance tracker with JWT/MFA auth and CI/CD via GitHub Actions.

Open to remote backend or fullstack roles with US/EU teams. Async-first, UTC-3 timezone.

contact.title: Contact
contact.openTo: Open to remote opportunities — async-first, UTC-3.
